stemHtml: Per ICAO Annex 17, how is "Security Control" defined?

options.a: A means by which the introduction of weapons, explosives, or other dangerous devices or substances that may be used in an act of unlawful interference can be prevented.
options.b: A check on a person's identity and background including, where legally permissible, any criminal history.
options.c: The application of technical or other means to identify and/or detect weapons, explosives, or other dangerous items.
options.d: A secret or public trial simulating an attempt to commit an unlawful act against aviation.
